overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a historic Victorian residential district. The character proceeds along wet cobblestone streets lined with brick walls, iron fences, and ornate mansions illuminated by warm gas street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential sidewalk with iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone sidewalk next to a brick wall and iron fence in the rain

entered.detail: tall red brick wall topped with ornate black wrought iron fencing running along the left side of the path
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow gaslight illuminating the rainy street
Victorian-era houses with balconies and lit windows visible behind the fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a brick wall and iron fence on the left. Warm gas street lamps cast yellow light onto the wet cobblestones, creating reflections. Victorian residential buildings are visible in the background through the rain and darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked horse-drawn carriages

events.description: passing a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right side of the muddy street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a parked carriage while approaching a large mansion in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the muddy street, partially illuminated by street lamp

entered.detail: black wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the side of the cobblestone street
large three-story Victorian mansion with columns and balconies becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the wet street, passing a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right. In the distance, a large ornate Victorian mansion with columns becomes visible through the rain, while the street lamps recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ornate Victorian mansion with iron gates

events.description: approaching the ornate iron gates and entrance of the large Victorian mansion
passing the mansion entrance and continuing along the brick wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the elaborate wrought iron gates of the Victorian mansion, observing the architecture

entered.detail: elaborate black wrought iron gates with stone pillars marking the mansion entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the impressive Victorian mansion with its ornate wrought iron gates and stone pillars. The mansion's detailed architecture and lit windows dominate the left side of the frame as the character walks past, then recedes as the journey continues along the wet cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with large willow tree

events.description: large willow tree becomes visible in front of the next house, increasing vegetation density

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet residential street, approaching a house with a prominent willow tree

notable_agents.action: second horse-drawn carriage parked further down the street

entered.detail: two-story Victorian house partially obscured by a large drooping willow tree

segments.scene_description: Past the mansion, the character continues along the rain-soaked street where a large willow tree becomes visible in front of another Victorian house. Another parked carriage appears on the right side of the street as the journey continues through the historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked Victorian residential district, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a vista of grand mansions. It begins with the character walking along a wet cobblestone path bordered by a brick wall and iron fence, where warm gas lamps cast yellow reflections across the glistening ground. As the character proceeds, the view opens up to reveal a parked horse-drawn carriage on the right and a large, ornate mansion with columns emerging through the rain. The scene then shifts to focus on the mansion's detailed architecture and wrought iron gates as the character passes directly beneath its lit windows. Finally, the camera continues along the street, moving past the estate toward another Victorian house framed by a large willow tree and a second parked carriage.
